definition: Contemplation of dhammas in the satipaṭṭhāna framework.
notes: Use this record for the dhamma branch of satipaṭṭhāna. Keep dhammas untranslated by default here so the branch does not get narrowed to abstract doctrine-talk or generic mental objects.

example_phrases.translation: one remains observing dhammas among dhammas

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the dhamma branch of satipaṭṭhāna in governed practice contexts.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten this into generic doctrinal study or abstract phenomena-language unless a source-facing note explicitly requires it.
